Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Feb-21-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Person with a Disability.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Cristina Garcia, Esq. appeared with petitioner Samim Minapara, who who was present as Guardian ad Litem for Claimant Tarik Minapara, who was also present for this morning's proceedings.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Nehboob Bhai, the father of petitioner Samim Minapara, was placed under oath but did not testify.
Order appointing Ms. Minapara Guardian ad Litem for Tarik Minapara was filed April 2, 2018.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $90,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $25,000.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $2,302.06.
Costs - $27,599.15.

The net balance of $35,098.79 shall be disbursed through a check made payable to Samim Minapara, the Petitioner/Guardian ad Litem for Claimant Tarik Minapara.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Person with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to March 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for a Progress Report on the Status of the prepayments on the parties' apartment unit.
